name: Paprika Beef Roll
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup Melted Butter or Bacon Drippings
recipeInstructions:
Total weight: 3 pounds.
1. Pound steaks until thin, rubbing them with salt, pepper, and plenty of paprika.
2. Overlap the steaks on a meat board to form one large steak. Spread with a layer of sliced mushrooms and thinly sliced onions. Add pimiento. Cover with finely rolled bread crumbs.
3. With a beater, combine 1/2 cup melted butter or bacon drippings, boiling water, and egg. Dribble this mixture over the bread crumbs.
4. Arrange stuffed olives in a row on one long side of the steak. Roll the meat around the olives. Tie the roll firmly. Season the outside with salt and pepper.
5. Brown in 1/2 cup butter or drippings in a roaster or deep earthenware baker.
6. Place whole mushrooms and onions in the roaster, sprinkling them lightly with salt, pepper, and paprika. Add 1 cup of red wine. Roast the meat in a 350°F oven for about two hours.
7. Serve hot or cold.
